FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7ff51cb4ba60>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-04-30T02:15:49Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-04-30T02:14:16Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert test_username in usernames, (
            f"Test user {test_username!r} not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/04/30 02:17:23.733947891 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/04/30 02:17:23.733955004 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.733997644 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.733999157 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734019926 {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734020908 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734034042 new <- list()
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734034934 if (!missing(width))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734049160 new$width <- width
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734050062 if (!missing(height))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734064629 new$height <- height
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734065842 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734081190 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734082212 if (!missing(title))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734096900 new$title <- title
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734097801 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734112098 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734112930 if (!missing(version))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734127136 new$version <- version
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734128008 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734142415 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734143286 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734157994 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734158765 if (!missing(bg))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734172902 new$bg <- bg
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734175427 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734188741 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734189523 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734203649 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734204731 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734220250 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734221132 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734252811 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734254103 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734270694 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734271756 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734287306 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734288278 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734304227 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734305099 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734320688 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734321590 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734340175 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734341036 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734359961 enc <- family$encoding
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734360863 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734377434 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734381852 "default"))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734439570 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734440823 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734455170 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734456963 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734476018 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734478072 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734494733 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734495705 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734510533 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734511384 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734523998 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734524740 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734536952 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734537684 if (is.null(pf))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734551790 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734552601 domain = NA)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734569493 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734570575 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734584982 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734585994 old$family <- family
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734607935 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734608827 version <- old$version
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734622863 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734623865 "2.0")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734638372 if (version %in% versions)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734639284 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734661776 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734662778 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734677515 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734678267 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734697866 domain = NA)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734700361 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734726690 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734727511 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734758479 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734759732 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734780931 invisible()
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734781963 }

2026/04/30 02:17:23.733947891 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/04/30 02:17:23.733955004 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.733997644 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.733999157 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734019926 {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734020908 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734034042 new <- list()
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734034934 if (!missing(width))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734049160 new$width <- width
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734050062 if (!missing(height))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734064629 new$height <- height
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734065842 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734081190 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734082212 if (!missing(title))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734096900 new$title <- title
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734097801 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734112098 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734112930 if (!missing(version))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734127136 new$version <- version
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734128008 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734142415 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734143286 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734157994 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734158765 if (!missing(bg))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734172902 new$bg <- bg
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734175427 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734188741 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734189523 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734203649 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734204731 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734220250 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734221132 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734252811 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734254103 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734270694 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734271756 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734287306 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734288278 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734304227 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734305099 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734320688 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734321590 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734340175 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734341036 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734359961 enc <- family$encoding
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734360863 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734377434 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734381852 "default"))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734439570 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734440823 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734455170 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734456963 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734476018 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734478072 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734494733 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734495705 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734510533 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734511384 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734523998 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734524740 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734536952 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734537684 if (is.null(pf))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734551790 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734552601 domain = NA)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734569493 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734570575 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734584982 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734585994 old$family <- family
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734607935 }
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734608827 version <- old$version
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734622863 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734623865 "2.0")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734638372 if (version %in% versions)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734639284 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734661776 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734662778 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734677515 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734678267 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734697866 domain = NA)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734700361 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734726690 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734727511 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734758479 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734759732 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/04/30 02:17:23.734780931 invisible()
